prompt: A long hospital corridor with beige walls, multiple patient room doors on both sides, overhead fluorescent panel lights, medical equipment and supply carts along the walls, and a nurses' station visible in the distance. Ahead past the nurses' station, the corridor opens into a T-junction with elevator doors and a green emergency exit sign. Behind, the corridor leads back toward a waiting area with plastic chairs and a water cooler near the entrance lobby. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, looking straight down the hospital corridor.

tracking_object.desc: red fire extinguisher in a glass case mounted on the wall

scene_adherence.visible_part: There is a long hospital corridor with beige walls. Multiple patient room doors are set on both sides of the corridor. Overhead fluorescent panel lights are installed on the corridor ceiling. A nurses' station is visible in the distance at the end of the corridor.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Medical equipment and supply carts are arranged along the corridor walls. Ahead past the nurses' station, the corridor opens into a T-junction with elevator doors and a green emergency exit sign. Behind the current viewing perspective, the corridor leads back toward a waiting area with plastic chairs and a water cooler near the entrance lobby.
